custom_css: Header .title-3d{font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 0 10px #a2d2ff,0 0 20px #ffffff!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important;animation:shiver 0.5s infinite!important}header .title-3d::before{content:none!important}header button{background:#e1eff6!important;border:2px solid #a2d2ff!important;border-radius:4px!important;color:#003049!important}aside .btn-pulse,#main-fire-btn{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#00b4d8,#caf0f8,#00b4d8)!important;color:#003049!important;font-weight:900!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:4px!important;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(202,240,248,0.6)!important;animation:frost-glow 3s infinite!important;background-size:200% auto!important}#main-fire-btn:active,aside .btn-pulse:active{transform:scale(0.97)!important;filter:brightness(1.2) contrast(1.1)!important}@keyframes shiver{0%{transform:translate(0)}25%{transform:translate(-0.5px, 0.5px)}50%{transform:translate(0.5px, -0.5px)}75%{transform:translate(-0.5px, -0.5px)}100%{transform:translate(0)}}@keyframes frost-glow{0%{background-position:0% 50%;box-shadow:0 0 5px #fff}50%{background-position:100% 50%;box-shadow:0 0 20px #a2d2ff}100%{background-position:0% 50%;box-shadow:0 0 5px #fff}}#streak-input{background:#f8fdff!important;border:1px solid #a2d2ff!important;color:#0077b6!important;border-radius:4px!important}.tab-btn.active{color:#00b4d8!important;text-shadow:0 0 8px #fff!important}.tab-btn.active::after{background:#00b4d8!important;height:3px!important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#a2d2ff!important;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(162,210,255,0.4)!important;background:#fff!important}
